name: Cheery Cherry Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit. Grease muffin cups.
2. In a large mixing bowl, combine flour, sugar, cherries, baking powder, and salt (if using).
3. In a separate bowl, mix buttermilk, vegetable oil, cherry juice, beaten egg, and almond extract.
4. Make a well in the dry ingredients and stir in the liquid just until moistened.
5. Fill muffin cups about 2/3 full.
6. Combine almonds and remaining sugar; sprinkle over each batter.
7. Bake for 25 to 30 minutes at 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
8. Cool for 10 minutes before removing from muffin cups.
9. Makes 12 muffins
